purpose: Initializes the program by accepting current date values and opening input files INFILE1 and INFILE2, setting end-of-file flags if necessary.
Reads a record from INFILE1 and moves it to the pending authorization summary if successful, or sets the end-of-file flag if no more records are available.
Reads a record from INFILE2 and, if the root segment key is numeric, moves relevant data to detail and qualifier fields, or sets the end-of-file flag if no more records are available.
Closes both INFILE1 and INFILE2 and displays error messages if either file fails to close.
Terminates the program abnormally by setting the return code to 16 and displaying an abend message.
Abends the program with return code 16 if an error occurs during file opening.
Inserts a root segment into the IMS database using data read from INFILE1.
Abends the program if the root segment insertion into IMS fails with an unexpected status code.
Inserts a child segment into the IMS database after setting up the qualifying SSA with the root key.
Performs an IMS insert call to insert the child segment after successfully retrieving the parent segment.
Abends the program with return code 16 when the root GU call fails.
Abends the program with return code 16 when the child segment insert call fails.
